title: Acorn's Journey
description: A Vanilla+ Modpack centered around revamping the visuals of the game while adding new mobs and blocks to discover!
body:
![Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9fe8bf307e8176cbf44c619ecac6653ac3eb937.png)
An expansive adventure modpack focused on exploration, survival, and discovery.

# Features

🌿 Balanced to keep the core game intact while expanding it thoughtfully! Very similar to my other modpack "A Land of Twigs" but without Create and a greater focus on exploration!

🌿 Expanded cooking and farming with **[Farmer’s Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)** and companion add-ons

🌿 Exploration challenges and overhauls with **[No Man’s Land](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-mans-land)**, **[Abundant Atmosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/abundant-atmosphere)**, **[Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns)**, and **_MORE_**!!!

🌿 New mobs added with **[Primal](https://modrinth.com/mod/mod-primal)**, **[Buzzier Bees](https://modrinth.com/mod/buzzier-bees)**, and **[Friends and Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes-forge)**. Existing mob retextures and overhauls included as well.

🌿 Overhauled world generation with biome, loot, and structure tweaks and added dozens of **new biomes, structures, creatures, and items** to discover!

🌿 **Quality of Life** features such as [Xaero’s Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) and [XP Tomes](https://modrinth.com/mod/xp-tome)

🌿 Fully compatible with shaders

🌿 100+ Mods

![Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1985615b68c2d9e12e9cc1c0dd1f11153b55dded.png)
